description: Squad mission lifecycle hooks — prevent premature termination during active missions

hooks.prompt: Check if a squad mission is currently active (look for references to squad stages RECON, PLAN, EXECUTE, VERIFY, DEBRIEF, RETRO in recent context, or an active TeamCreate/team). If a mission IS active and not yet completed through DEBRIEF and RETRO stages, block stopping with: 'Squad mission still in progress at stage [X]. Complete remaining stages or explicitly abort before stopping.' If no mission is active or the mission has completed all stages including RETRO, approve stopping.
